review_text: Absolutely fantastic product. Battery life exceeded my expectations at nearly 8 hours. The noise cancellation is impressive for the price point. Highly recommend.
The sound quality is decent but the left earbud stopped working after two weeks. Customer support was unhelpful. Would not repurchase.
Makes excellent coffee and heats up quickly. Only complaint is the water reservoir is a bit awkward to fill. Otherwise a solid purchase.

review_title: Changed how I think about systems
review_text: One of the most impactful books I have read in years. Dense but rewarding. The author's explanations of complex systems are remarkably clear.
The material feels premium but sizing is off — order one size up. Color matches the photos accurately. Returned for exchange.
